behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all required paths (src/Controls/Maps/README.md, Controls.Maps.csproj), required properties (PackageReadmeFile, IsPackable, PackageTags, PackageId), required strings (UseMauiMaps, dotnet add package, Maps and mapping support), and platform list matching tests.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required content and metadata but doesn't provide the actual README text or exact csproj XML snippets.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for string presence (e.g., 'UseMauiMaps', 'dotnet add package'), feature keywords (3 of 7), and structural XML properties — multiple valid README phrasings would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests parse XML with ET.parse, run git subprocess commands, and validate structural properties — not solely text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require the README to exist with >=500 chars, specific strings, and csproj to declare PackageReadmeFile — a stub/no-op would not pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction's requirements (README length, install, init, features, link, csproj metadata, PublicAPI preservation) map to the visible test functions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Repo CI Gates, pass_to_pass/repo_tests) and descriptive docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces Markdown and csproj XML, not structured API/JSON data; csproj schema is standard SDK-style and described.

no_typos.reason: Paths (src/Controls/Maps/src/Controls.Maps.csproj, README.md) and command names (UseMauiMaps, PackageReadmeFile) are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies the file to modify (csproj) because the task domain is explicitly 'add packaged README' — naming the csproj is intrinsic to the task, not spoiler.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: csproj edit is localized: add PackageReadmeFile property and a None item; instruction explicitly says existing properties must be preserved.
